_instructions.howToUpdate: Add new projects to the 'projects' array below. Each project should follow the structure defined here.

structure.title: Project title - max 30 characters (required)
structure.subtitle: Brief subtitle like 'coded, designed' - max 20 characters (optional)
structure.description: Project description - MAX 80 CHARACTERS for best display (required)
structure.image: Image URL - not displayed but kept for reference (optional)
structure.technologies: Array of tech stack items - max 4 items recommended (required)

_instructions.note: Keep descriptions concise and impactful. Focus on what the project does, not how.

projects.title: Piyoway
projects.subtitle: designed, developed
projects.description: AI-powered Sri Lanka travel planner with smart itineraries.

projects.title: Resume Builder
projects.subtitle: coded, designed
projects.description: ATS-friendly resume builder with live preview and PDF export.

projects.title: MazeMaster
projects.subtitle: coded
projects.description: Arduino maze game with RFID scoring and ESP32 control.

projects.title: Quizzly Edu
projects.subtitle: client project
projects.description: Interactive medical learning and quiz platform with analytics.

projects.title: Garbo SWMS
projects.subtitle: ongoing
projects.description: Smart waste management system with multi-role mobile app.

projects.title: Smart Painter
projects.subtitle: coded
projects.description: AI-assisted digital painting and image editing platform.
